IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: TO ENHANCE THE REGION BY PROVIDING HISTORICAL AND CULTURAL EDUCATIONAL PROJECTS.
IRS990.MissionDesc: TO ENHANCE THE REGION BY PROVIDING HISTORICAL AND CULTURAL EDUCATIONAL PROJECTS.
IRS990.Desc: THROUGH THE EXCHANGE OF IDEAS AND INTERCOMPANY ACTIVITIES, THE ORGANIZATION AIMS TO PROVIDE A LEGACY FOR GENERATIONS TO COME. SPONSORS THE ANNUAL APPLE AND CHEESE FESTIVAL AND SHOWS HISTORICAL SIGNIFICANCES.
